---
name: Specification Defect
about: Report an error, inconsistency, or ambiguity in an AFEOL Workspace Framework specification.
title: "[Specification Defect] "
labels: defect
assignees: ""
---

# Specification

Which specification is affected?

Examples:

- Workspace Foundation
- Workspace Contract
- Diagnostics Specification

---

# Section

Identify the affected section, chapter, or requirement.

---

# Description

Describe the defect clearly and concisely.

---

# Expected Behavior

Describe what you believe the specification should state.

---

# Impact

Who is affected?

- [ ] Framework authors
- [ ] Runtime implementers
- [ ] Application developers
- [ ] Documentation only

---

# Additional Context

Provide references, examples, diagrams, or related discussions if applicable.
